---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? Why would it be useful?

## Proposed solution

How should it work? Include an example workflow snippet or expected output if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why you'd prefer this one.
